user.title: Add a transformed calendar
user.description: Wrap an existing calendar to rewrite event summaries and/or filter out events, based on regexes matched against each event's description. At least one of the substitute or filter patterns is required.

data_description.name: Name of the new calendar entity.
data_description.source_entity: The calendar whose events will be transformed.
data_description.pattern: Optional Python regex applied to each event's description (with re.MULTILINE). Must contain at least one capture group. The summary is replaced using the match; if the pattern does not match, the original summary is kept. Leave empty to only filter events.
data_description.replacement: Template used to build the new summary, with backreferences like \1, \2 referring to the substitute pattern's capture groups. Leave empty to use the first capture group.
data_description.blocklist: Optional Python regex applied to each event's description (with re.MULTILINE). Events whose description matches are hidden from this calendar. Leave empty to keep all events. Example: tasks\.google\.com/task/ hides Google Tasks.

error.pattern_or_blocklist_required: Enter a substitute pattern, a filter pattern, or both.
error.invalid_regex: The substitute pattern is not a valid regex.
error.no_capture_group: The substitute pattern must contain at least one capture group, e.g. (.+).
error.invalid_backreference: The replacement references a capture group that does not exist in the substitute pattern.
error.invalid_blocklist: The filter pattern is not a valid regex.

data_description.source_entity: The calendar whose events will be transformed.
data_description.pattern: Optional Python regex applied to each event's description (with re.MULTILINE). Must contain at least one capture group. The summary is replaced using the match; if the pattern does not match, the original summary is kept. Leave empty to only filter events.
data_description.replacement: Template used to build the new summary, with backreferences like \1, \2 referring to the substitute pattern's capture groups. Leave empty to use the first capture group.
data_description.blocklist: Optional Python regex applied to each event's description (with re.MULTILINE). Events whose description matches are hidden from this calendar. Leave empty to keep all events. Example: tasks\.google\.com/task/ hides Google Tasks.

error.pattern_or_blocklist_required: Enter a substitute pattern, a filter pattern, or both.
error.invalid_regex: The substitute pattern is not a valid regex.
error.no_capture_group: The substitute pattern must contain at least one capture group, e.g. (.+).
error.invalid_backreference: The replacement references a capture group that does not exist in the substitute pattern.
error.invalid_blocklist: The filter pattern is not a valid regex.
